nameMeanings.name: Woodford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Woodford in Cheshire, Cornwall, Essex, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire. In Scotland, the name is derived from Woodford in Saint Boswells (Roxburghshire).
History: Thomas Woodford emigrated from Lincolnshire, England, to NY in 1690.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: Christiana Woodford was born in 1302, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Sr John Pruet. She died in 1321, in her hometown, at the age of 19.

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Woodford(은)는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sr John Pruet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 그녀의 고향에서 19세의 나이로 사망했다.
